title: Fieldset
description: Foldkit-native Base UI Fieldset primitive preserving native fieldset disabled behavior, explicit legend association, parent-disabled propagation, and root/legend data attributes without hidden runtime state.
distinguishes: Foldkit-native Base UI Fieldset primitive preserving native fieldset disabled behavior, explicit legend association, parent-disabled propagation, and root/legend data attributes without hidden runtime state.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native render helper.
Provides Effect Schema and predicate helpers for serializable options and explicit disabled/legend state.

development.reason: Origin React runtime is evidence only; installable source is Foldkit-native.
Origin React runtime is evidence only; installable source is Foldkit-native.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

deviations.summary: Legend association uses an explicit or root-derived legendId option instead of React context registration.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit render helpers are stateless and do not use hidden mutable context. Root aria-labelledby and legend id are derived from config or supplied by the consumer.

deviations.summary: Only Root and Legend parts are implemented; description, error, invalid, and required Fieldset parts or states are omitted.
deviations.rationale: The pinned Base UI Fieldset source and docs expose Root and Legend only, with disabled as the only Fieldset state. Additional form field states belong to later Field/Form primitives.

deviations.summary: Parity origin fixture uses static source-derived markup for deterministic Root and Legend output.
deviations.rationale: Root and Legend render deterministic markup, and this matches the existing static-fixture pattern for behavior primitives while pinned origin source remains available in repos/base-ui.
